source_filing: Apple Inc. 10-K FY2023 (filed 2023-11-03), MD&A — Net Sales
original_text: Total net sales were $383,285 million in fiscal 2023, compared to $394,328 million in fiscal 2022.
modified_text: Apple's total net sales declined about 8% in fiscal 2023 compared to 2022.
claim: Apple's total net sales declined about 8% in fiscal 2023 compared to 2022.
citation_as_written: Apple Inc. 10-K FY2023, MD&A — Net Sales
notes: Derived-figure mismatch: computing from the base figures gives (383,285-394,328)/394,328 = -2.8%, but the claim states ~8%. numeric_mismatch -> unsupported.
